articles.description: A Single Bench of Justice Gurpal Singh Ahluwalia in Gwalior gave the verdict in an Election Petition filed by Mr. Rawat and said that Congress MLA Mukesh Malhotra has “deliberately and knowingly suppressed material information regarding framing of charges in two pending criminal cases and misled the electorate”.

articles.title: Oil shock hits Pakistan? PM Sharif halves fuel for Govt vehicles, bans ministers’ foreign trips as US-Iran war rages
articles.description: As oil prices soar amid the US-Iran conflict, Pakistan's Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif has unveiled stringent austerity measures, including halving fuel for government vehicles and banning foreign travel for officials. These steps aim to mitigate the economic impact on Pakistam, he said.

articles.title: Iran offers safe passage through Strait of Hormuz to European and Arab states. But there's a catch
articles.description: The Strait of Hormuz, through which roughly one-fifth of the world’s oil supply normally passes, has become a focal point of the confrontation between US-Israel and Iran, with uncertainty about supply sparking considerable volatility in global energy prices.

articles.title: 20% Mumbai hotels, restaurants shut as LPG supply disruption hits operations: Association
articles.description: Mumbai hotels restaurants shut as LPG supply disruption hits operations Association

articles.title: How fast‑tracking the Women’s Reservation Bill could reshape the 2027 electoral map
articles.description: The timing of these “feelers” is significant. In 2027, seven States go to polls, four of which are ruled by the BJP

articles.title: Iran Fires Drones At Saudi, Kuwait After Trump Says War Could Be Over Soon
articles.description: Iranian fired drones towards Saudi Arabia and Kuwait early Tuesday as the war in the Middle East shows no sign of abating.
